acceptanceReviewed.criterion: The check validates required PR template headings and fields for node id, acceptance criteria, evidence paths, qd reports, platform validation, residual risks, DAG/topology changes, Linux readiness, macOS validation, and qd evidence/report linkage.
Missing required fields produce file-scoped errors.
just pr-template-check and just check pass.
Evidence and qd reports are recorded.
No product runtime, capture, encode, transport, decode, render, presentation, cross-device, or latency claim is made.

realWorldValidation.evidence: Repository check and PR template contract validation only; no product runtime validation is required.
